metadata.description: Prefix used for naming all Moodle resources.
Azure region for all regional resources.
Administrator username for the VM scale set instances and controller VM.
Administrator password for the VM scale set instances and controller VM.
Administrator username for Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Server.
Administrator password for Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Server.
Custom domain to bind to Azure Front Door, for example moodle.contoso.com.
Name of the Moodle database to create in MySQL.
Address space for the virtual network, e.g. 10.0.0.0/16.
Address prefix for the frontend subnet (VMSS + ILB + Private Link Service).
Address prefix for the control subnet (Controller VM).
Address prefix for the data subnet (all private endpoints: MySQL, Storage, Key Vault).
Prefix used for naming network resources.
Azure region for the virtual network and NSGs.
Tags applied to all taggable resources in this module.
Address space for the virtual network, e.g. 10.0.0.0/16.
Address prefix for the frontend subnet (VMSS + ILB + Private Link Service). Must be within vnetAddressPrefix.
Address prefix for the control subnet (Controller VM). Must be within vnetAddressPrefix.
Address prefix for the data subnet (all private endpoints: MySQL, Storage, Key Vault). Must be within vnetAddressPrefix.
Prefix used for naming MySQL resources.
Azure region for MySQL resources.
Tags applied to all taggable resources in this module.
Virtual network resource ID used for private DNS linking.
Subnet resource ID used for the MySQL private endpoint.
Administrator username for Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Server.
Administrator password for Azure Database for MySQL Flexible Server.
Name of the Moodle database to create.
Prefix used for naming storage resources.
Azure region for storage resources.
Tags applied to all taggable resources in this module.
Virtual network resource ID used for private DNS linking.
Subnet resource ID used for the storage private endpoint.
Prefix used for naming compute resources.
Azure region for compute resources.
Tags applied to all taggable resources in this module.
Administrator username for the VM scale set instances and controller VM.
Administrator password for the VM scale set instances and controller VM.
Subnet resource ID for the frontend tier.
Subnet resource ID for the control tier.
Subnet resource ID for the Private Link Service NAT IP configuration.
Storage account name hosting the Premium Azure Files share.
Azure Files share name mounted by Moodle nodes and the controller VM.
Storage account key used by setup scripts to mount Azure Files.
Prefix used for naming Key Vault resources.
Azure region for Key Vault resources.
Tags applied to all taggable resources in this module.
Virtual network resource ID used for private DNS linking.
Subnet resource ID used for the Key Vault private endpoint (data subnet).
Principal ID of the VM scale set system-assigned managed identity.
Principal ID of the controller VM system-assigned managed identity.
MySQL administrator password stored as a secret.
Azure Files storage account key stored as a secret.
Prefix used for naming Front Door resources.
Location for Front Door resources. Use global for Azure Front Door.
Tags applied to all taggable resources in this module.
Custom domain to bind to Azure Front Door.
Resource ID of the Private Link Service exposed behind the internal load balancer.
Origin host header and hostname used by Front Door to reach the internal load balancer.
Azure region where the Private Link Service is deployed. Required by Front Door to approve the private endpoint connection.

sharedPrivateLinkResource.requestMessage: Approve Azure Front Door Premium access to the Moodle private origin.

metadata.description: Prefix used for naming Azure Bastion resources.
Azure region for Bastion resources.
Tags applied to all taggable resources in this module.
Virtual network resource ID. Developer SKU attaches to the VNet directly — no dedicated subnet needed.
